violations.text: he presence of small flies is not controlled by the presence of flies at bar. Insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment shall have pest control company assess and treat for flies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The floors and under equipment in the bar area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled by the presence of flies at bar. Insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment shall have pest control company assess and treat for flies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the flooring at bar, under and behind equipment at bar was observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment shall clean area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
